message:
feat(core): entropy accounting for information-aware memory management (wa-wcyz)

Add entropy_accounting.rs implementing:
- Sliding-window Shannon entropy estimator with O(1) per-byte update
- Information cost computation (raw_bytes × entropy/8)
- Entropy-aware eviction scoring with recency decay
- Information budget tracking across panes
- Compression ratio lower bound estimation

Also fix recording.rs CollectingTap to use std::sync::Mutex instead of
async runtime_compat::Mutex (synchronous test helper was using wrong type).

29 unit tests covering entropy computation, incremental estimation,
eviction scoring, budget tracking, and e2e eviction ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
